stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced accelerated production of Blackwell AI chips amid surging demand from hyperscalers. Economically, this boosts AI infrastructure spending, signaling continued capex by Big Tech. Market psychology: FOMO drives buying as investors fear missing AI supercycle. Historical parallel: Similar to GPU boom in 2023. Analogies: 1) Like oil rigs during shale revolution - supply ramp fuels growth. 2) High-performance engine in a racing car economy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show positive coverage on Blackwell ramp-up; X semantic search reveals 85% positive sentiment from latest 20 posts (e.g., analysts upgrading PT to $200+). High engagement on AI theme.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 6-10% upside in 1-2 weeks on momentum; target $155.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short above $160 if supply chain delays emerge; potential 3% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Chip supply shortages, US-China trade tensions, broader tech selloff.

stocks.justification: Strong consensus from news/X, historical AI momentum, real-time data alignment.

stocks.impact_theory: Elon Musk's X post on Robotaxi event details sparked hype. Implications: Accelerates autonomy narrative, potential FSD revenue. Psychology: Cult following amplifies volatility. Parallels: Cybertruck launch hype in 2023. Analogies: 1) Teaser trailer for blockbuster movie. 2) Fuel injection upgrade promising hypercar speeds.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X keyword search (query: TSLA OR $TSLA since:2026-04-09) shows 70% bullish posts with high faves; news on event hype from Reuters, CNBC.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long calls for 8% gain pre-event; target $270.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short post-hype if demo disappoints; 5-7% downside.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Event underdelivery, regulatory hurdles for autonomy, margin pressure.

stocks.justification: High sentiment but event risk introduces uncertainty.

stocks.impact_theory: Partnership with NVDA for Blackwell servers announced. Implications: Positions SMCI as key AI server supplier. Psychology: Momentum trade on AI infrastructure. Parallels: 2024 server boom. Analogies: 1) Body shop for Ferrari engines. 2) Highway builder for EV revolution.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive analyst notes via web search; X posts bullish on partnership (15/20 positive).

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if margins squeeze; 4% loss potential.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Competition from Dell/HP, inventory glut, accounting concerns.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to NVDA news, strong technicals.

stocks.impact_theory: Azure AI revenue beat expectations in quarterly update. Implications: Cloud/AI dominance. Psychology: Safe mega-cap play. Parallels: Post-ChatGPT surge. Analogies: 1) Cloud as digital real estate boom. 2) OS upgrade in computing eras.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings previews positive; X sentiment 80% favorable.

stocks.impact_theory: MI300X AI chip gains traction vs NVDA. Implications: Competition heats up, pricing pressure. Psychology: Value AI play. Parallels: Intel-AMD rivalry. Analogies: 1) Challenger brand in luxury autos. 2) Runner-up in tech arms race.
